templates.text: You have {{metrics.low-yield-cash | currency}} earning less than 1% APY. Move some to a HYSA earning 4%+.
templates.detail: High-yield savings accounts at online banks (Varo, Axos, Newtek) pay 4-5% APY vs. near-zero at traditional checking/savings. Transferring excess cash earns several thousand in interest per year with no risk.
templates.successTemplate: Moved {{input:amount | currency}} to {{input:destination}}. Earning ~{{calc:input.amount * input.apy / 100 | currency}}/year at {{input:apy}}% APY.

newActionsOnSuccess.text: Verify {{input:destination}} is set up and earning {{input:apy}}% APY. Consider setting up auto-transfer for future savings.
